quick_skim.title: Quantum Algorithm for Open-System Battery Cathodes by Modeling Multiple Strongly Coupled Holstein Polarons with Chain-Mapped Caldeira-Leggett Dynamics
quick_skim.abstract: Cathode lithiation occupies a chemical regime of tightly localized orbitals, narrow bandwidths, and strong electron-lattice coupling. The defining electrochemical observables (open-circuit voltage and differential capacity) are open-system, reservoir-equilibration quantities that closed-Hamiltonian quantum simulation cannot produce, set by exchange with electron, Li$^+$, and phonon baths. We present a fault-tolerant quantum algorithm that recovers them through a unitary chain-mapped Caldeira-Leggett embedding, rendering the baths Trotterizable. The resulting fourth-order Trotter step has a T-gate count polynomial in system size, validating its open-system dynamics against hierarchical equations of motion (HEOM) at strong coupling and the Lindblad limit at weak coupling. For single-carrier olivine LiFePO$_4$, a single voltage anchor on an otherwise DFT-fixed Hamiltonian places the differential-capacity peak within the $\pm5$ mV reproducibility of the experimental plateau. For multi-carrier spinel LiMn$_2$O$_4$, whose $1{:}1$ Mn$^{3+}$/Mn$^{4+}$ filling makes the inter-site Coulomb repulsion dynamically active, the same kernel yields a two-plateau voltage curve with a $125$ mV split, within $17\%$ of the observed $150$ mV. We deliver an end-to-end fault-tolerant resource estimate for such a multi-carrier, three-reservoir observable: $368$ logical qubits and $\sim3\times10^5$ T-gates per step, or $\sim1.7\times10^{12}$ T-gates for a full voltage curve (parallelizable over $\sim10^3$ trajectories), leaving the production-scale dynamical run as a milestone for future hardware. The same kernel reproduces macroscopic quantum coherence, two-band superconductivity, and the Mikheyev-Smirnov-Wolfenstein resonance without modification, placing dynamical battery chemistry and similar Hamiltonians within scope for fault-tolerant quantum simulation.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Develops quantum algorithm to predict battery cathode open-circuit voltage, which is essential for state of charge estimation.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 开发量子算法预测电池阴极开路电压，这对于荷电状态估计至关重要。
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 开发量子算法预测电池阴极开路电压，这对于荷电状态估计至关重要。
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 开发量子算法预测电池阴极开路电压，这对于荷电状态估计至关重要。
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Addressing the challenge of simulating open-system battery cathodes to obtain accurate electrochemical observables like OCV and dQ/dV, this paper presents a fault-tolerant quantum algorithm using chain-mapped Caldeira-Leggett embedding. The method achieves polynomial T-gate count and validates open-system dynamics, providing a foundational step toward accurate battery modeling for SOC estimation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 为克服封闭哈密顿量模拟无法获取开路电压和差分容量等开放系统电化学可观测量的局限，本文提出了一种容错量子算法，通过链映射Caldeira-Leggett嵌入实现浴的Trotter化，使T门计数与系统大小成多项式关系，并验证了开放系统动力学。该工作为电池阴极的精确建模迈出基础性一步，可间接提升基于模型SOC估计的准确性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 为克服封闭哈密顿量模拟无法获取开路电压和差分容量等开放系统电化学可观测量的局限，本文提出了一种容错量子算法，通过链映射Caldeira-Leggett嵌入实现浴的Trotter化，使T门计数与系统大小成多项式关系，并验证了开放系统动力学。该工作为电池阴极的精确建模迈出基础性一步，可间接提升基于模型SOC估计的准确性。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: state of charge estimation for lithium ion batteries

quick_skim.title: Autonomous End-to-End SOH Prediction Services for Battery Systems via Temporal-Contrastive Representation Learning
quick_skim.abstract: Accurate state of health (SOH) estimation is a critical diagnostic service for lithium-ion battery management. However, reliance on labor-intensive manual feature engineering and opaque black-box models hinders scalable industrial deployment. To address this, we introduce TC-SOH: a modular, plug-and-play service architecture for autonomous, end-to-end SOH prediction. TC-SOH employs a temporal-contrastive mechanism and a cross-window prediction pretext task to extract degradation-relevant representations directly from raw operational data. To improve transparency, we connect model efficacy with representation diagnostics: visualization, sensitivity analysis, redundancy analysis, bidirectional probing, future-SOH probing, and temporal shuffling show that learned features overlap with selected expert descriptors while retaining additional SOH-relevant variation, and that ordered temporal context improves subsequent-SOH prediction. Across four public datasets, TC-SOH outperforms the considered physics-informed and data-driven baselines, reducing MAPE by 1.91 times and RMSE by 2.13 times.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: End-to-end SOH prediction using contrastive representation learning, applicable to SOC estimation
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用对比表示学习的端到端SOH预测，可应用于SOC估计
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用对比表示学习的端到端SOH预测，可应用于SOC估计
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用对比表示学习的端到端SOH预测，可应用于SOC估计
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes TC-SOH, an autonomous end-to-end SOH prediction service for lithium-ion batteries using temporal-contrastive representation learning, which could be adapted for SOC estimation in battery management systems.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对锂离子电池健康状态（SOH）估计依赖人工特征工程和黑箱模型的问题，提出一种模块化即插即用架构TC-SOH，利用时序对比学习和跨窗口预测预训练任务，从原始运行数据中自动提取退化相关表示，实现端到端SOH预测。通过表示诊断提高透明度，验证了方法有效性。该框架可迁移至电池荷电状态（SOC）估计，为电池管理系统提供更通用的状态监测方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对锂离子电池健康状态（SOH）估计依赖人工特征工程和黑箱模型的问题，提出一种模块化即插即用架构TC-SOH，利用时序对比学习和跨窗口预测预训练任务，从原始运行数据中自动提取退化相关表示，实现端到端SOH预测。通过表示诊断提高透明度，验证了方法有效性。该框架可迁移至电池荷电状态（SOC）估计，为电池管理系统提供更通用的状态监测方案。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: battery management system state of charge estimation
